name: financial_crime_water_allocation_model_redwood_lib_eq
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Financial Crime Compliance, the situation tagged internally around financial crime water allocation model redwood lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elliot Silva
agents.identity: I am Elliot Silva, the accountable executive on this bridge in Financial Crime Compliance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Kim
agents.identity: I am Ravi Kim, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Financial Crime Compliance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Elliot Silva must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Elliot Silva do?
